title: Ivycomb Music Discs
description: Datapack that adds Ivycomb's Music to Minecraft
body:
![Minecraft Ivycomb music](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eb3f8cba43714484471a4535e7ef737097318f0.png)

This data pack adds Ivycomb songs as music discs to Minecraft, each with its own crafting recipe.
### Debug:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

> /function ivycomb_discs:give_discs - gives all Ivycomb discs, use in survival mode    
> /function ivycomb_discs:give_recipes - gives all recipes

</details>
